<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework; use Throwable; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class InvalidDataProviderException extends Exception { private ?string $providerLabel = null; public static function forException(Throwable $e, string $providerLabel): self { $exception = new self( $e->getMessage(), $e->getCode(), $e, ); $exception->providerLabel = $providerLabel; return $exception; } public function getProviderLabel(): ?string { return $this->providerLabel; } }
